name: 10K FOLLOWERS~!!!
description:
I AM GEEKING I SWEAR

I never expected to reach 10k followers at all and it makes me happy that a lot of people are enjoying my daily content.

ANNOUNCEMENT: I’d like to apologize that I haven’t uploaded a bot in what seems like 4 days, but I have been just really sick and in the middle of something a little bit personal! I entirely forgot to say that I will be on a break, but I promise that I will be back tomorrow on Thursday 26 December with a bot.
